description: US-423 references output eval — golden cases over the bundled gst-3.2.5 cartridge (no gst, no VS Code). Drives the real two-tier cross-reference engine (workspaceXref + WorkspaceIndex ∪ the bundled crossReference tier) exactly as server.ts assembles it, then packages the result with buildCrossReference. The `▮` marks the selector under the cursor; per case we assert the union count, the per-row provenance (workspace / cartridge:<dialect>@<version>), key labels, the Workspace ≻ Cartridge ranking, and that the long tail is ranked — never filtered (AC6). Every result must also carry the honest union/uncertainty disclaimer (AC2).

cases.name: AC1 implementors of a kernel selector are the cartridge union (printString → Object, Integer)
AC1 implementors union: a workspace class + the cartridge, workspace ranked first
AC1 senders of a workspace selector list the calling method
AC1 senders union: a workspace send + the cartridge senders of do:, workspace first
AC6 a self-send is ranked above a dynamic send, but the dynamic one is NOT filtered
